description:
Two smaller duplications found:

1. DaemonEventRecord duplicated:
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_events.rs:15-23
- orchestrator-web-contracts/src/models/daemon_event_record.rs:4-13
Both define identical fields (schema, id, seq, timestamp, event_type, project_root, data). Should be defined once in web-contracts and imported by CLI.

2. default_allowed_tool_prefixes duplicated:
- agent-runner/src/runner/process.rs:61-81
- orchestrator-core/src/runtime_contract.rs:36-58
Both construct the same MCP tool prefix whitelist (ao., mcp__ao__, etc.). Should be in protocol since it's a policy constant.

3. CLI tracker path logic duplicated:
- agent-runner/src/cleanup.rs:15-19 (get_tracker_path)
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_runner.rs:34-36 (cli_tracker_path_cli)
Both resolve to protocol::Config::global_config_dir().join("cli-tracker.json").
title: Deduplicate DaemonEventRecord type and MCP tool prefix resolution
